title: Global Education Content Manager (d/f/m) - Hamburg
required_skills: 5 years experience in global/regional education content development
Strong expertise in B2C and B2B education content development
Advanced knowledge of hybrid learning formats (e-learning, blended learning, in-person training)
bonus_skills: Bachelor/Master in Marketing, Education, or Communication
Digital platform experience for content distribution
matched_skills: Master's degree in PR & Advertising (Shih Hsin) — relevant educational background
Project management skills — HSBC PMO, Hapag-Lloyd coordination, IPC Marketing product launches
B2B content and communication — IPC Marketing 4 product launches, B2B GTM strategy
Cross-functional team coordination — multi-workstream stakeholder management at HSBC
Event operations at scale — Moli Media events (4000+ attendees), KOL management
English C1 — strong English proficiency meets fluency requirement
ROI analytics — Moli Media ROI analytics for events
International team experience — HSBC (digital transformation) and Hapag-Lloyd (global logistics)
missing_skills: Haircare or beauty industry domain knowledge
Hair professional community or salon industry knowledge
Content platform management (LMS, digital education tools)
core_responsibilities: Develop and execute global education strategy through education and event concepts (trade fairs, shows)
Create high-quality, inspiring education content (digital and physical) for professional hair industry
Design future-ready learning experiences using mixed channels (in-salon, digital, social, blended)
Define and implement global standards and guidelines for consistent execution across markets
Empower local teams through Train-the-Trainer programs, toolkits, and scalable education systems
Drive measurable business impact by linking education initiatives to commercial performance
recommended_emphasis: Moli Media large-scale event operations (4000+ attendees) as education/event program management
IPC Marketing B2B product launch content and GTM strategy as B2B content development
KOL management experience at Moli Media as professional community engagement
ROI analytics capability to demonstrate data-driven content performance measurement
summary: Scoring 30.8, this is a weak match. The Henkel Global Education Content Manager role focuses heavily on haircare/beauty industry education content and train-the-trainer program development — domains that are absent from Boru's background. The transferable strengths include event management at scale (Moli Media 4000+ attendees), B2B content and GTM experience (IPC Marketing), and strong project management. However, the specialized beauty/hair industry context and e-learning design expertise create significant gaps. Application is possible as a stretch but requires a compelling repositioning narrative.
